name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_NEW_TARGETPAIRS_2024
description: Top assignees by new target pairs in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p0:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y0:Year)
WITH tp, min(y0.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS emerging_targetpair_count
ORDER BY emerging_targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies introduced the greatest number of novel target-pair combinations in 2024?
In 2024, which assignees ranked highest by the number of newly disclosed target-pair combinations?
Which companies were the most prolific in filing novel target-pair combinations during 2024?
